name: Grappling Hook
effect: This fighter may move vertically up to 6" onto a terrain feature. This does not count against their total move distance for the turn.

name: Thermal Detonator
effect: Select a point within 6". All fighters within 3" of that point take 4 damage. This item is Limited(1).

name: Camouflage Cloak
effect: This fighter always counts as being in Light Cover even if they are in the open, as long as they did not make an Attack action this turn.

name: Astromech Socket
effect: If this fighter is a Droid, they gain the Mechanic (2) skill and may use their activation to heal an adjacent Droid or Vehicle for D6 wounds.

name: Personal Shield Generator
effect: The first time this fighter would take damage each round, reduce that damage by 2 (to a minimum of 0).

name: Smoke Grenade
effect: Place a 3" diameter smoke cloud within 6". The area blocks Line of Sight for the remainder of the round.

name: Cybernetic Enhancement
effect: This fighter ignores the 'halve move' effect of the Agonising trait and the movement penalty from Suppression tokens.

name: Vibro-Bayonet
effect: Attach to a Rifle or Sniper Rifle weapon. That weapon gains the Versatile trait and deals 2/4 damage in melee.

name: Bounty Tracker
effect: Choose one visible enemy fighter. Until the end of the battle, this fighter may reroll one attack die when targeting that enemy.

name: Oxygen Mask / Rebreather
effect: This fighter is immune to the effects of Poison, Rad, and Gas-based area effects.

name: Demolition Charge Pack
effect: Choose a point within 4” and place a Demolition token. At the end of this fighter's activation, all fighters (friend or foe) within 3” of the token take 3 damage. Limited(1).

name: Stealth Cloak
effect: This fighter always counts as being in Light Cover. If this fighter performs a [Stealth] action, they gain two Stealth tokens instead of one.

name: Bacta Patch
effect: Heal this fighter or a friendly within 1” for 4 wounds. No Droids. Limited(1).

name: Emergency Beacon
effect: Place a reinforcement point within 3”. Allies may deploy here. Limited(1).

name: Climbing Line
effect: Climb vertical surfaces up to 6” without spending extra movement.

name: Vox Scrambler
effect: Fighters within 6” cannot use communication-based abilities this round.

name: Jetpack
effect: This model gains +2 Move and the the Fly trait for the remainder of the activation.

name: Rebreather Mask
effect: Immune to gas effects and suffocation hazards.

name: Flame Projector
effect: Choose a visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter Allocate 2 damage points to that fighter.

name: Comlink
effect: This fighter may use an ability with a range, ignoring the range, if the target is a friendly fighter with a Comlink.

name: Macrobinoculars
effect: Reveal one hidden or Stealthed enemy fighter within 12" and line of sight. That fighter loses any Stealth token and cannot gain one until the end of round.

name: Field Rations
effect: Remove all negative tokens from this fighter (Suppressed, Weakened, etc.). Droids cannot benefit from this effect. This ability can only be used once per game.

name: Smoke Canister
effect: Create a 3" diameter smoke area within 6" that blocks line of sight and grants cover. Disperses at the end of round. This ability can only be used once per game.

name: Mandalorian Armor
effect: This fighter gains +2 Def and their Defence may not be lowered by abilities.
